title: Executive (Volunteer Management)
description:
1. Volunteer Recruitment

  • Assist in implement and evaluate all volunteer recruitment, orientation and activities
  • Assist in recruit, screen, interview and check references of all potential volunteers
  • Assist in planning and implement training programmes for volunteers
  • Liaise with volunteers and partners to recruit, retain and deploy volunteers for all the internal/external programmes and services
  • Community outreach to find volunteers, assessing organisational needs and capacity for volunteers, monitor and evaluate the progress of volunteers.

2. Volunteer Appreciation Events

  • Assist in planning and execute all volunteer appreciation events
  • Assist in writing submissions and/or coordinate volunteer submissions to the newsletter/website
  • Prepare the evaluation report for all the events

3. Volunteer Management Database

  • Maintain computerised volunteer database management
  • Ensure all volunteers information is captured, stored and managed in compliance with Personal Data Protection Act.
  • Regularly update the volunteer’s contact details
  • Collect statistics on volunteer recruitment, attrition, appreciation
  • Review current forms & develop new forms as appropriate

Job Requirements:

  • Minimum Diploma/Degree or equivalent qualification.
  • A certificate in the Volunteer Management will be an added advantage
  • Preferred 2 years relevant working experience in a similar capacity preferably in healthcare industry
  • Proficient in use of MS Office Applications
  • Resourceful, self-driven, proactive and independent
  • Possess good communication and interpersonal skills

Competencies:

Must-have:

  • Collaborative Practices Across Disciplines and Sectors - Level 3
  • Volunteer Programme Management - Level 3
  • Volunteer Programme Evaluation - Level 3
  • Volunteer Retention and Engagement - Level 3
  • Volunteer Recruitment - Level 3
  • Stakeholder Management - Level 3
  • Diversity Awareness and Management - Level 3

Good-to-have:

  • Trends Evaluation and Application - Level 3
  • Diversity Awareness and Management - Level 3

Critical Core Skills

  • Communication - Basic
  • Influence - Basic
  • Collaboration - Basic
  • Adaptability - Basic
  • Decision Making - Basic

*Please refer to Technical Skills and Competency (TSCs) and Critical Core Skills (CCSs) in Skills Framework for Social Service Industry via this link SSG | Social Service (skillsfuture.gov.sg)

postedCompany.description: A leading VWO that provides social and community services for the benefit of the aged sick and the needy regardless of race, language or religion.
postedCompany.name: Sree Narayana Mission (Singapore)
